name: Card
description: A card groups related content and actions about a single subject — a vehicle summary, a KPI, an alert. Cards make a dashboard scannable by giving each thing its own contained surface.
keyRule: Use a card to collect everything about one entity. If you're listing many comparable records, a data table is usually clearer than a wall of cards.

variants.name: Elevated
variants.whenToUse: Default — a subtle shadow lifts the card off the page.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: Flatter surfaces / dense dashboards where shadows add noise.

variants.name: With media
variants.whenToUse: When an image/map adds context (vehicle photo, location).

variants.name: Actionable (whole-card)
variants.whenToUse: The entire card navigates to detail.

anatomy.name: Header
anatomy.description: title, subtitle, optional avatar and overflow ⋮.

anatomy.name: Content
anatomy.description: supporting text, KPIs, or a small table.

behaviors.name: Actions
behaviors.description: Keep card actions low-emphasis (text/outlined); reserve the contained button for the page's primary action.

behaviors.name: Whole-card click
behaviors.description: If the card is clickable, show hover/focus and don't bury separate interactive controls that compete with the card click.

behaviors.name: Density
behaviors.description: On dashboards, prefer compact cards in a grid; align heights for a tidy grid.

props.name: title
props.description: Card title, rendered as a heading.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional subtitle line under the title (e.g. "Jane Cooper · Active").

props.name: content
props.description: Supporting text, KPIs, or a small table — kept to a single subject.

props.name: media
props.description: Optional media/image/map thumbnail region above the header.

props.name: variant
props.description: Outlined removes the elevation shadow in favor of a divider border. Elevated is the default.

props.name: actions
props.description: Row of low-emphasis actions (usually text buttons).

props.name: actionable
props.description: Makes the whole card a single clickable target that navigates to detail.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Handler fired when an actionable card is clicked or activated via keyboard.

doThis: Align cards into a tidy grid on dashboards.
dontDoThis: Don't replace a comparable-records table with many cards.
Don't stack multiple contained buttons in a card.
accessibility: The card's title is a heading.
An actionable card is a single link/button with an accessible name, or it exposes its inner controls clearly — not both in a confusing way.
Focus is visible and order is logical.

related.name: DataTable
related.why: When operators compare many records, use a table

related.name: List
related.why: Dense homogeneous content scans better as a list

related.name: ExpansionPanel
related.why: Collapsible content that stays in the page flow
